penalties.description: Maximum time reached without completing tail cut inside the trainer.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video shows clear loop placement around the middle appendage with the knot positioned at what appears to be the marked site. The pusher is used to advance and secure the knot. However, the tail cutting phase is not completed within the visible frames, resulting in an incomplete task penalty and zero score per FLS rules.
